newsSince: No new material company-specific news since June 9. The NVIDIA Kyber 800VDC ultra-slim auxiliary PSU reference designs (1,700V PowiGaN InnoMux-2) were announced June 1, predate the window and were already in the prior case. Routine AGM/say-on-pay vote passed; no new guidance.

sources.label: Power Integrations Kyber 800VDC PSU designs (IR, June 1)

verdicts.rankRationale: No genuinely new info since June 1 Kyber 800VDC designs, already reflected. On this residual-alpha list the +120% YTD rerating limits hidden alpha; direct power-bottleneck exposure stays attractive but no new catalyst justifies a second consecutive move. Hold at 15.
verdicts.bull: 1,700V PowiGaN positions POWI in NVIDIA 800VDC AI rack power; direct, AI-adjacent bottleneck content.
verdicts.neutral: Design-in optionality real but already priced after a +120% YTD run; residual alpha thinning.
verdicts.bear: Industrial/consumer power cycle exposure; supply-risk downgrade flagged; rich valuation.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: 800VDC/Kyber GaN content ramp into AI data-center power.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Consumer/industrial cyclicality and valuation after large rerating.

verdicts.rankRationale: Through the AI-node-bottleneck lens POWI remains analog/power, less direct than HBM, advanced packaging or AI networking nodes. Nothing since June 1 changes node centrality; prior verdict already demoted it. Hold at 87.
verdicts.bull: GaN power content gains relevance as 800VDC AI racks scale; differentiated high-voltage IP.
verdicts.neutral: Adjacent to the core AI-node bottleneck, not on the critical HBM/packaging path.
verdicts.bear: Power/analog cyclicality; not a direct compute-supply chokepoint on this page.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Limited node centrality versus HBM/packaging/networking peers.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the co-packaged-optics lens the CPO-specific link stays weak; data-center power matters but is not optics content. No new CPO-relevant evidence since June 1; page already demoted POWI. Hold at 93, no compounding.
verdicts.bull: Data-center power demand rises alongside CPO buildouts, indirect tailwind.
verdicts.neutral: Power exposure real but tangential to the co-packaged-optics thesis.
verdicts.bear: No CPO content; industrial/consumer power cycle drives the stock, not optics.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Weak/absent CPO linkage on this specialized page.
